projectDescription: Official website for CIDTES, an interdisciplinary organization offering training, certification, consulting, and applied research in energy, sustainability, and occupational health with over 20 years of expertise.
keyFeatures: Training and workshops in energy, sustainability, and occupational safety
Labor competency certification processes accredited by CONOCER
Specialized consulting in energy management and sustainable development
Applied research in renewable energy and sustainability
Full course catalog organized by category (Energy, Safety, Personal Development, etc.)
Interactive service diagram with animated circular navigation
Client portfolio showcase with partner and collaboration carousels
Responsive Next.js 14 frontend with Tailwind CSS and Radix UI components
publicApiSurface: GET / — Home page (Who we are, commitments, mission/vision, clients)
GET /capacitacion — Training methodology and course listings
GET /consultoria — Consulting areas (Climate Change, Energy, Sustainability, etc.)
GET /investigacion-consultoria — Research & consulting with ODS alignment
GET /cursos — Full course catalog by category
